name: Aruuz-Nigar
description: Meter (bahr) analysis for Urdu poetry. Provides scansion, bahr identification, and structural comparison of Urdu misra.

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Scans one or more Urdu misra (newline-separated text). Single-line input returns one result; multiline input returns per-line results.

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Compares two Urdu misra with full structural detail: bahr match verdict, per-line scansion (full_code, word_codes, feet, meter_pattern), distance from the closest bahr, deviations, and a positional code diff showing exactly where the two lines diverge.

tools.name: rhyme
tools.description: Identifies the rhyme scheme of a given Urdu poem.

tools.name: help
tools.description: Shows the server description and available tools.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: The URL of your Aruuz-Nigar SSE endpoint
